items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis has powerful striking.
items.quote: Dricus Du Plessis has powerful striking.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis has poor defensive wrestling.
items.quote: He has little terrible defensively at wrestling.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman is inactive, having fought only once in the last year.
items.quote: Usman, you know, since that point has one fight against Joaquin Buckley a year ago. He's not active.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman is in the final phase of his career at age 39.
items.quote: Kamaru Usman is towards that final phase at 39

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis is the only fighter in UFC history to land a takedown on Khamzat Chimaev.
items.quote: He's also the only guy in the UFC to ever land a takedown on Hamzat Chimaev.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis has extra motivation to beat Kamaru Usman due to past comments regarding his African heritage.
items.quote: I feel like Du Plessis has some extra motivations to beat Kamaru Usman

items.claim: Ana Maria Santo has a significant weakness in her grappling defense.
items.quote: I just have too many questions about Ana Maria Santo's grappling.

items.claim: Ana Maria Santo possesses top 15 level striking skills.
items.quote: I really do think she has top 15 striking skills.
I think Tommy McMillan's going to break Montes.
